debug_info.goal:
α : Type
inst✝ : LinearOrder α
label : α
l : LabelledTree α
h : IsOrdered α inst✝ l
⊢ fastCheckMem α inst✝ label l = true ↔ label ∈ l

failed_attempts:
have h₁ : fastCheckMem label l = true ↔ label ∈ l := by
    match l with
    | .leaf x =>
      -- Case: l is a leaf
      simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
      <;>
      (try cases' le_total x label with h₂ h₂ <;> simp_all [h₂, eq_self_iff_true, eq_comm]) <;>
      (try { aesop }) <;>
      (try { simp_all [h₂, le_of_eq] }) <;>
      (try { omega })
    | .node v l r =>
      -- Case: l is a node
      by_cases h₂ : v = label
      · -- Subcase: v = label
        simp_all [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
        <;>
        (try { aesop }) <;>
        (try {
          cases' IsOrdered (node v l r) with h₃ h₄
          <;> simp_all [IsOrdered]
          <;> tauto
        })
      · -- Subcase: v ≠ label
        by_cases h₃ : label < v
        · -- Subcase: label < v
          have h₄ : fastCheckMem label l = true ↔ label ∈ l := by
            -- Proof by induction on l, but we assume it's already proved for the left subtree
            have h₅ : IsOrdered l := by
              -- Prove that the left subtree is ordered
              cases' h with h₅ h₆
              cases' h₅ with h₅₀ h₅₁
              exact h₆.1
            exact fastCheckMem_correct label l h₅
          simp_all [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
          <;>
          (try { aesop }) <;>
          (try {
            cases' IsOrdered (node v l r) with h₄ h₆
            <;> simp_all [IsOrdered]
            <;> tauto
          })
        · -- Subcase: label ≥ v
          have h₄ : ¬(label < v) := h₃
          have h₅ : label ≥ v := by
            by_contra h₅
            have h₆ : label < v := by
              have h₆₁ : label ≤ v := by
                linarith
              have h₆₂ : label ≠ v := by
                intro h₆₂
                apply h₂
                linarith
              exact lt_of_le_of_ne h₆₁ (by intro h; subst h; contradiction)
            contradiction
          by_cases h₆ : label = v
          · -- Subsubcase: label = v
            exfalso
            apply h₂
            linarith
          · -- Subsubcase: label > v
            have h₇ : label > v := by
              cases' lt_or_gt_of_ne h₆ with h₇ h₇
              · exfalso
                linarith
              · exact h₇
            have h₈ : fastCheckMem label r = true ↔ label ∈ r := by
              -- Proof by induction on r, but we assume it's already proved for the right subtree
              have h₉ : IsOrdered r := by
                -- Prove that the right subtree is ordered
                cases' h with h₉ h₁₀
                cases' h₉ with h₉₀ h₉₁
                exact h₁₀.2.2.2.2
              exact fastCheckMem_correct label r h₉
            simp_all [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
            <;>
            (try { aesop }) <;>
            (try {
              cases' IsOrdered (node v l r) with h₉ h₁₀
              <;> simp_all [IsOrdered]
              <;> tauto
            })
  exact h₁

have h_main : fastCheckMem label l = true ↔ label ∈ l := by
    have h₂ : ∀ (t : LabelledTree α), IsOrdered t → (fastCheckMem label t = true ↔ label ∈ t) := by
      intro t ht
      induction t with
      | leaf x =>
        cases' le_total label x with h₃ h₃ <;> simp_all [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem, IsOrdered]
        <;>
        (try { contradiction }) <;>
        (try { aesop }) <;>
        (try {
          split_ifs at * <;>
          simp_all [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem, IsOrdered] <;>
          aesop
        }) <;>
        (try {
          norm_num at * <;>
          aesop
        })
      | node v l r =>
        have h₃ := ht.1
        have h₄ := ht.2.1
        have h₅ := ht.2.2.1
        have h₆ := ht.2.2.2.1
        have h₇ := ht.2.2.2.2
        cases' lt_trichotomy label v with h₈ h₈ <;> simp_all [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem, IsOrdered]
        <;>
        (try {
          split_ifs at * <;>
          simp_all [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem, IsOrdered] <;>
          (try {
            have h₉ := h₃
            have h₁₀ := h₄
            aesop
          }) <;>
          (try {
            have h₉ := h₅
            have h₁₀ := h₆
            aesop
          }) <;>
          (try { aesop })
        }) <;>
        (try {
          norm_num at * <;>
          aesop
        }) <;>
        (try {
          have h₉ : label ∈ l ∨ label ∈ r := by
            have h₁₀ : label ∈ l ∨ label ∈ r := by
              by_cases h₁₁ : label ∈ l
              · exact Or.inl h₁₁
              · have h₁₂ : label ∈ r := by
                  have h₁₃ : label ∈ l ∨ label ∈ r := by
                    simp_all [LabelledTree.mem]
                    <;> aesop
                  cases' h₁₃ with h₁₃ h₁₃
                  · exfalso
                    exact h₁₁ h₁₃
                  · exact h₁₃
                exact Or.inr h₁₂
            exact h₁₀
          cases' h₉ with h₉ h₉ <;> simp_all [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem, IsOrdered]
          <;> aesop
        }) <;>
        (try {
          aesop
        })
    exact h₂ l h
  exact h_main

- So in this case, both sides are true.

2. `label < v`: then it checks `fastCheckMem label l₁`. By IH, `fastCheckMem label l₁ = true ↔ label ∈ l₁`.
   - We need to prove that `fastCheckMem label l = true ↔ label ∈ l`.
     - If `fastCheckMem label l = true`, then by definition, `fastCheckMem label l₁ = true`, so by IH, `label ∈ l₁`, so `label ∈ l` (`l₁` is a subpart of `l`).
     - Conversely, if `label ∈ l`, then `label ∈ l₁ ∨ label ∈ l₂`. If `label ∈ l₁`, then by IH, `fastCheckMem label l₁ = true`, so the `fastCheckMem label l` returns `true`. 
     - What if `label ∈ l₂`? But `IsOrdered l` requires that all elements in `l₂` are ≥ `v`, but `label < v`, so this cannot happen. 
       - Proof: for any `x ∈ l₂`, we have `v ≤ x`. If `x = label`, then `v ≤ label`, but `label < v`, impossible.

   - Therefore, `label ∈ l` implies `label ∈ l₁`, and so the two sides are equivalent.

3. `¬(label < v)`: then it checks `fastCheckMem label l₂`. This is symmetric to the `label < v` case. 
   - If `label ∈ l`, then `label ∈ l₁ ∨ label ∈ l₂`. But if `label ∈ l₁`, then since all in `l₁` are ≤ `v`, we must have `label ≤ v`. But since `¬(label < v)`, we have `label = v`, but we already handled `label = v` earlier. Wait no: the `v == label

have h₁ : ∀ (t : LabelledTree α), IsOrdered t → (fastCheckMem label t = true ↔ label ∈ t) := by
    intro t ht
    induction t generalizing label using LabelledTree.induction with
    | leaf x =>
      simp [fastCheckMem]
      <;>
      (try simp_all [IsOrdered, LabelledTree.mem]) <;>
      (try split_ifs <;> simp_all [IsOrdered, LabelledTree.mem]) <;>
      (try omega) <;>
      (try aesop)
    | node v l r ihl ih =>
      simp_all [fastCheckMem, IsOrdered, LabelledTree.mem]
      <;>
      (try split_ifs <;> simp_all [IsOrdered, LabelledTree.mem]) <;>
      (try
        {
          by_cases h₂ : label < v <;> by_cases h₃ : label = v <;> simp_all [h₂, h₃]
          <;>
          (try omega) <;>
          (try aesop)
        }) <;>
      (try
        {
          by_cases h₂ : label < v <;> by_cases h₃ : label = v <;> simp_all [h₂, h₃]
          <;>
          (try omega) <;>
          (try aesop)
        }) <;>
      (try
        {
          aesop
        })
  exact h₁ l h

have h₁ : fastCheckMem label l = true ↔ label ∈ l := by
    classical
    -- Define a helper function to check membership efficiently
    have h₂ : ∀ (t : LabelledTree α), IsOrdered t → (fastCheckMem label t = true ↔ label ∈ t) := by
      intro t ht
      induction t with
      | leaf x =>
        -- Base case: the tree is a leaf
        simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
      | node x l r =>
        -- Inductive step: the tree is a node
        simp_all [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem, IsOrdered, le_of_lt]
        <;>
        (try
          {
            split_ifs at * <;>
            (try contradiction) <;>
            (try simp_all) <;>
            (try
              {
                have h₃ := ht.1
                have h₄ := ht.2.1
                have h₅ := ht.2.2.1
                have h₆ := ht.2.2.2.1
                simp_all [IsOrdered, LabelledTree.mem]
                <;>
                (try omega) <;>
                (try
                  {
                    by_cases h₇ : label ≤ x <;>
                    simp_all [h₇] <;>
                    (try omega)
                  })
                <;>
                (try tauto)
              })
          })
        <;>
        (try
          {
            by_cases h₃ : label = x <;>
            by_cases h₄ : label ≤ x <;>
            simp_all [h₃, h₄]
            <;>
            (try tauto)
            <;>
            (try
              {
                have h₅ := ht.1
                have h₆ := ht.2.1
                have h₇ := ht.2.2.1
                have h₈ := ht.2.2.2.1
                simp_all [IsOrdered, LabelledTree.mem]
                <;>
                (try omega)
                <;>
                (try
                  {
                    by_cases h₉ : label ≤ x <;>
                    simp_all [h₉] <;>
                    (try omega)
                  })
                <;>
                (try tauto)
              })
          })
        <;>
        (try
          {
            tauto
          })
    -- Apply the helper function to the given tree
    have h₃ := h₂ l h
    exact h₃
  exact h₁

   - However, we need to ensure that `IsOrdered` is correctly used in the inductive step. In particular, if we go to `left` or `right`, we have that `left` and `right` are `IsOrdered` because of the assumption on `IsOrdered` of `l = node v left right`.

2. **Backward Direction (`label ∈ l` → `fastCheckMem = true`)**:
   - We need to show that if `label` is in the tree, then the fast check will find it.
   - This is harder because the `IsOrdered` condition doesn't directly help. For example, suppose `l = node 3 (leaf 3) (leaf 5)` and `label = 3`. Then `label ∈ l`, and `fastCheckMem 3 l` goes into the `v == label` case (`v = 3`, label = 3), so it returns `true`, as expected. Alternatively, if `label = 5`, then `5 ∈ l`, and `fastCheckMem 5 l` goes into `¬ (5 < 3)` and checks `right`, `fastCheckMem 5 (leaf 5)`, which is `true`.
   - If we have a case like `l = node 3 (leaf 2) (leaf 3)` and `label = 2`, then `label ∈ l`, and `fastCheckMem 2 l` goes into `¬ (2 < 3)`? Wait, no, `2 < 3` is true, so it checks `left`, `fastCheckMem 2 (leaf 2)`, which returns `true`.
   - In this case, the backward direction seems to work, because if `label` is in the tree, we can just do a standard traversal and find it using the ordering.

But is this always true? The `IsOrdered` condition imposes that every element in the left is ≤ v and every element in the right is ≥ v. So if we are looking for `label`, and `label < v`, then it can only be in the left, and similarly for `label > v`, it can only be in the right. And if `label = v`, we found it

have h_main : fastCheckMem label l = true ↔ label ∈ l := by
    have h₁ : ∀ (t : LabelledTree α), IsOrdered t → (fastCheckMem label t = true ↔ label ∈ t) := by
      intro t ht
      induction t using LabelledTree.recOn
      | leaf x =>
        simp [fastCheckMem, Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem]
        <;>
        cases' le_or_lt label x with h₂ h₂ <;>
        simp_all [h₂] <;>
        (try { contradiction }) <;>
        (try { aesop }) <;>
        (try {
          simp_all [LT.lt, LE.le]
          <;>
          omega
        })
      | node v l r =>
        simp_all [fastCheckMem, Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem, IsOrdered]
        <;>
        (try {
          split_ifs at * <;>
          (try { simp_all [Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem, IsOrdered] }) <;>
          (try {
            have h₂ := ht.1
            have h₃ := ht.2.1
            have h₄ := ht.2.2.1
            have h₅ := ht.2.2.2.1
            have h₆ := ht.2.2.2.2
            simp_all [Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem, IsOrdered]
            <;>
            (try {
              cases' lt_or_le label v with h₇ h₇ <;>
              simp_all [h₇] <;>
              (try { aesop }) <;>
              (try {
                have h₈ := h₃ label
                have h₉ := h₃ v
                simp_all [Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem, IsOrdered]
                <;>
                (try { aesop }) <;>
                (try {
                  cases' lt_or_le label v with h₁₀ h₁₀ <;>
                  simp_all [h₁₀] <;>
                  (try { aesop })
                })
              }) <;>
              (try {
                have h₈ := h₂ label
                have h₉ := h₂ v
                simp_all [Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem, IsOrdered]
                <;>
                (try { aesop }) <;>
                (try {
                  cases' lt_or_le label v with h₁₀ h₁₀ <;>
                  simp_all [h₁₀] <;>
                  (try { aesop })
                })
              })
            })
          }) <;>
          (try {
            have h₂ := ht.1
            have h₃ := ht.2.1
            have h₄ := ht.2.2.1
            have h₅ := ht.2.2.2.1
            have h₆ := ht.2.2.2.2
            simp_all [Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem, IsOrdered]
            <;>
            (try { aesop }) <;>
            (try {
              cases' lt_or_le label v with h₇ h₇ <;>
              simp_all [h₇] <;>
              (try { aesop }) <;>
              (try {
                have h₈ := h₃ label
                have h₉ := h₃ v
                simp_all [Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem, IsOrdered]
                <;>
                (try { aesop }) <;>
                (try {
                  cases' lt_or_le label v with h₁₀ h₁₀ <;>
                  simp_all [h₁₀] <;>
                  (try { aesop })
                })
              }) <;>
              (try {
                have h₈ := h₂ label
                have h₉ := h₂ v
                simp_all [Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem, IsOrdered]
                <;>
                (try { aesop }) <;>
                (try {
                  cases' lt_or_le label v with h₁₀ h₁₀ <;>
                  simp_all [h₁₀] <;>
                  (try { aesop })
                })
              })
            })
          })
        })
        <;>
        (try {
          aesop
        })
        <;>
        (try {

          <;>
          (try { aesop })
          <;>
          (try {
            cases' lt_or_le label v with h₂ h₂ <;>
            simp_all [h₂] <;>

          })
        })
        <;>
        (try {
          exfalso

        })
    have h₂ := h₁ l h
    exact h₂
  exact h_main

        )
      exact h₅
    -- Combine the two implications to get the final result
    constructor
    · intro h
      exact h₃ h
    · intro h
      exact h₂ h
  exact h₁

have h_main : fastCheckMem label l = true ↔ label ∈ l := by
    have h₁ : ∀ (t : LabelledTree α), IsOrdered t → (fastCheckMem label t = true ↔ label ∈ t) := by
      intro t ht
      induction t using LabelledTree.recOn
      · -- Case: t is a leaf
        intro x
        simp [IsOrdered, fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
        <;>
        (try cases' lt_or_le label x with h h <;> simp_all [h]) <;>
        (try cases' le_or_lt label x with h h <;> simp_all [h]) <;>
        (try aesop)
      · -- Case: t is a node
        intro v l r ih₁ ih₂
        simp [IsOrdered, fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem] at ht ⊢
        have h₂ : (∀ x ∈ l, x ≤ v) := ht.1
        have h₃ : (∀ x ∈ r, v ≤ x) := ht.2.1
        have h₄ : IsOrdered l := ht.2.2.1
        have h₅ : IsOrdered r := ht.2.2.2.1
        by_cases h₆ : label = v
        · -- Subcase: label = v
          simp_all [h₆]
          <;>
          (try tauto) <;>
          (try aesop)
        · -- Subcase: label ≠ v
          have h₇ : label < v ∨ v < label := by
            cases' lt_or_gt_of_ne h₆ with h h
            · exact Or.inl h
            · exact Or.inr h
          cases' h₇ with h₇ h₇
          · -- Subcase: label < v
            simp_all [h₇, fastCheckMem]
            <;>
            (try {
              have h₈ : ∀ x ∈ r, v ≤ x := ht.2.1
              have h₉ : v < label → False := by
                intro h₉
                linarith
              simp_all [not_mem]
              <;>
              (try tauto) <;>
              (try aesop)
            }) <;>
            (try {
              have h₈ : ∀ x ∈ r, v ≤ x := ht.2.1
              have h₉ : label < v := h₇
              have h₁₀ : label ∈ r → False := by
                intro h₁₀
                have h₁₁ : v ≤ label := h₈ label h₁₀
                linarith
              simp_all [not_mem]
              <;>
              (try tauto) <;>
              (try aesop)
            }) <;>
            (try {
              simp_all [ih₁]
              <;>
              (try tauto) <;>
              (try aesop)
            }) <;>
            (try {
              simp_all [ih₂]
              <;>
              (try tauto) <;>
              (try aesop)
            }) <;>
            (try {
              aesop
            })
          · -- Subcase: v < label
            simp_all [h₇, fastCheckMem]
            <;>
            (try {
              have h₈ : ∀ x ∈ l, x ≤ v := ht.1
              have h₉ : label < v → False := by
                intro h₉
                linarith
              simp_all [not_mem]
              <;>
              (try tauto) <;>
              (try aesop)
            }) <;>
            (try {
              have h₈ : ∀ x ∈ l, x ≤ v := ht.1
              have h₉ : v < label := h₇
              have h₁₀ : label ∈ l → False := by
                intro h₁₀
                have h₁₁ : label ≤ v := h₈ label h₁₀
                linarith
              simp_all [not_mem]
              <;>
              (try tauto) <;>
              (try aesop)
            }) <;>
            (try {
              simp_all [ih₁]
              <;>
              (try tauto) <;>
              (try aesop)
            }) <;>
            (try {
              simp_all [ih₂]
              <;>
              (try tauto) <;>
              (try aesop)
            }) <;>
            (try {
              aesop
            })
    exact h₁ l h
  exact h_main
(leaf v) (leaf x

have h₁ : fastCheckMem label l = true ↔ label ∈ l := by
    have h₂ : ∀ (t : LabelledTree α), IsOrdered t → (fastCheckMem label t = true ↔ label ∈ t) := by
      intro t ht
      induction t with
      | leaf x =>
        simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
        <;>
        (try cases le_or_lt label x <;> simp_all [eq_comm]) <;>
        (try { by_cases h₃ : label = x <;> simp_all }) <;>
        (try { aesop })
      | node v l r =>
        have h₃ : (∀ x ∈ l, x ≤ v) ∧ (∀ x ∈ r, v ≤ x) ∧ IsOrdered l ∧ IsOrdered r ∧ (v ∈ l ∨ v ∈ r) := ht
        have h₄ : (fastCheckMem label (node v l r) = true ↔ label ∈ (node v l r)) := by
          by_cases h₅ : label = v
          · -- Case: label = v
            simp_all [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
            <;>
            (try { aesop })
          · -- Case: label ≠ v
            by_cases h₆ : label < v
            · -- Subcase: label < v
              have h₇ : fastCheckMem label (node v l r) = fastCheckMem label l := by
                simp_all [fastCheckMem]
                <;>
                (try { aesop })
                <;>
                (try { simp_all [h₅, h₆, not_lt] })
                <;>
                (try { omega })
              rw [h₇]
              have h₈ : (fastCheckMem label l = true ↔ label ∈ l) := by
                apply (h₂ l h₃.2.2.1)
              rw [h₈]
              have h₉ : (label ∈ l ↔ label ∈ (node v l r)) := by
                constructor
                · intro h₉
                  simp_all [LabelledTree.mem]
                  <;> aesop
                · intro h₉
                  simp_all [LabelledTree.mem]
                  <;> aesop
              rw [h₉]
              <;> simp_all
            · -- Subcase: label ≥ v
              have h₇ : ¬label < v := h₆
              have h₈ : label ≠ v := h₅
              have h₉ : label > v := by
                cases' lt_or_eq_of_le (le_of_not_lt h₇) with h₉ h₉
                · exact h₉
                · exfalso
                  apply h₈
                  linarith
              have h₁₀ : fastCheckMem label (node v l r) = fastCheckMem label r := by
                simp_all [fastCheckMem]
                <;>
                (try { aesop })
                <;>
                (try { simp_all [h₅, h₆, not_lt] })
                <;>
                (try { omega })
              rw [h₁₀]
              have h₁₁ : (fastCheckMem label r = true ↔ label ∈ r) := by
                apply (h₂ r h₃.2.2.2.1)
              rw [h₁₁]
              have h₁₂ : (label ∈ r ↔ label ∈ (node v l r)) := by
                constructor
                · intro h₁₂
                  simp_all [LabelledTree.mem]
                  <;> aesop
                · intro h₁₂
                  simp_all [LabelledTree.mem]
                  <;> aesop
              rw [h₁₂]
              <;> simp_all
        exact h₄
    exact (h₂ l h)
  exact h₁

have h₁ : ∀ (t : LabelledTree α), IsOrdered t → (fastCheckMem label t = true ↔ label ∈ t) := by
    intro t ht
    match t with
    | .leaf x =>
      simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
      <;>
      aesop
    | .node v l r =>
      have h₂ : fastCheckMem label (node v l r) = true ↔ label ∈ (node v l r : LabelledTree α) := by
        by_cases h₃ : label = v
        · simp_all [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
          <;>
          aesop
        · by_cases h₄ : label < v
          · have h₅ : fastCheckMem label (node v l r) = fastCheckMem label l := by
              simp [fastCheckMem, h₃, h₄]
              <;>
              aesop
            have h₆ : label ∈ (node v l r : LabelledTree α) ↔ label ∈ l ∨ label ∈ r := by
              simp [LabelledTree.mem]
              <;>
              aesop
            have h₇ : IsOrdered l := by
              have h₈ := ht.2.2.1
              exact h₈
            have h₈ : fastCheckMem label l = true ↔ label ∈ l := by
              apply h₁
              exact h₇
            simp_all [h₅, h₆, h₈]
            <;>
            aesop
          · have h₅ : ¬label < v := h₄
            have h₆ : v ≤ label := by
              by_contra h₇
              have h₈ : label < v := by
                exact lt_of_not_ge h₇
              contradiction
            have h₇ : fastCheckMem label (node v l r) = fastCheckMem label r := by
              simp [fastCheckMem, h₃, h₅]
              <;>
              (try {
                cases' lt_or_le label v with h₈ h₈ <;>
                simp_all [lt_irrefl, lt_asymm]
                <;>
                aesop
              })
              <;>
              (try {
                aesop
              })
            have h₈ : label ∈ (node v l r : LabelledTree α) ↔ label ∈ l ∨ label ∈ r := by
              simp [LabelledTree.mem]
              <;>
              aesop
            have h₉ : IsOrdered r := by
              have h₁₀ := ht.2.2.2.1
              exact h₁₀
            have h₁₀ : fastCheckMem label r = true ↔ label ∈ r := by
              apply h₁
              exact h₉
            simp_all [h₇, h₈, h₁₀]
            <;>
            aesop
      simpa using h₂
  exact h₁ l h

have h₁ : ∀ (l : LabelledTree α) (h : IsOrdered l) (label : α), fastCheckMem label l = true ↔ label ∈ l := by
    intro l h label
    induction l generalizing label with
    | leaf x =>
      simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
      <;> aesop
    | node v l r =>
      simp [fastCheckMem, IsOrdered, LabelledTree.mem] at h ⊢
      by_cases h₂ : label = v
      · simp_all
        <;> aesop
      · by_cases h₃ : label < v
        · simp_all [IsOrdered, LabelledTree.mem]
          <;>
          (try
            {
              have h₄ := h.1
              have h₅ := h.2.1
              have h₆ := h.2.2.1
              have h₇ := h.2.2.2.1
              have h₈ := h.2.2.2.2
              simp_all [IsOrdered, LabelledTree.mem]
              <;> (try omega) <;> (try aesop)
            })
          <;> (try omega) <;> (try aesop)
        · have h₃' : label ≥ v := by
            by_contra h₄
            have h₅ : label < v := lt_of_not_ge h₄
            contradiction
          simp_all [IsOrdered, LabelledTree.mem]
          <;>
          (try
            {
              have h₄ := h.1
              have h₅ := h.2.1
              have h₆ := h.2.2.1
              have h₇ := h.2.2.2.1
              have h₈ := h.2.2.2.2
              simp_all [IsOrdered, LabelledTree.mem]
              <;> (try omega) <;> (try aesop)
            })
          <;> (try omega) <;> (try aesop)
  exact h₁ l h label

have h₁ : fastCheckMem label l = true ↔ label ∈ l := by
    -- Define a helper lemma to prove the equivalence for each case of the tree structure
    have h₂ : ∀ (t : LabelledTree α), IsOrdered t → (fastCheckMem label t = true ↔ label ∈ t) := by
      intro t ht
      induction t using LabelledTree.recOn with
      | leaf x =>
        -- Base case: when the tree is a leaf
        simp [fastCheckMem, Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem]
        <;>
        (try decide) <;>
        (try
          {
            by_cases h : x = label
            · simp_all [h]
            · simp_all [h]
          }) <;>
        (try
          {
            by_cases h : x = label
            · simp_all [h]
            · simp_all [h]
          }) <;>
        (try
          {
            by_cases h : x = label
            · simp_all [h]
            · simp_all [h]
          })
      | node v l r =>
        -- Inductive step: when the tree is a node
        have h₃ : (∀ x ∈ l, x ≤ v) ∧ (∀ x ∈ r, v ≤ x) ∧ IsOrdered l ∧ IsOrdered r ∧ (v ∈ l ∨ v ∈ r) := ht
        have h₄ : fastCheckMem label (node v l r) = true ↔ label ∈ (node v l r : LabelledTree α) := by
          by_cases h₅ : label = v
          · -- Case: label = v
            simp [h₅, fastCheckMem, Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem]
            <;>
            (try decide) <;>
            (try
              {
                by_cases h₆ : v ∈ l
                <;> by_cases h₇ : v ∈ r
                <;> simp_all [h₆, h₇]
                <;> aesop
              })
          · -- Case: label ≠ v
            have h₆ : label < v ∨ ¬(label < v) := by
              by_cases h₇ : label < v
              · exact Or.inl h₇
              · exact Or.inr (by
                  have h₈ : ¬(label < v) := h₇
                  exact h₈)
            cases h₆ with
            | inl h₆ =>
              -- Subcase: label < v
              have h₇ : fastCheckMem label (node v l r) = fastCheckMem label l := by
                simp [h₅, h₆, fastCheckMem]
                <;>
                (try decide) <;>
                (try
                  {
                    by_cases h₈ : label = v
                    <;> simp_all [h₈]
                    <;>
                    (try omega)
                  })
              have h₈ : (fastCheckMem label (node v l r) = true ↔ fastCheckMem label l = true) := by
                rw [h₇]
              have h₉ : (label ∈ (node v l r : LabelledTree α) ↔ label ∈ l ∨ label ∈ r) := by
                simp [Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem]
                <;>
                (try decide)
              have h₁₀ : (fastCheckMem label l = true ↔ label ∈ l) := by
                have h₁₁ : IsOrdered l := h₃.2.2.1
                have h₁₂ : fastCheckMem label l = true ↔ label ∈ l := by
                  apply (h₂ l h₁₁)
                exact h₁₂
              have h₁₁ : label ∈ l → label ∈ (node v l r : LabelledTree α) := by
                intro h₁₁
                simp [Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem] at h₁₁ ⊢
                <;> aesop
              have h₁₂ : label ∈ (node v l r : LabelledTree α) → label ∈ l ∨ label ∈ r := by
                intro h₁₂
                simp [Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem] at h₁₂ ⊢
                <;> aesop
              have h₁₃ : fastCheckMem label l = true → fastCheckMem label (node v l r) = true := by
                intro h₁₃
                rw [h₇]
                <;> simp_all
              have h₁₄ : fastCheckMem label (node v l r) = true → fastCheckMem label l = true := by
                intro h₁₄
                rw [h₇] at h₁₄
                <;> simp_all
              have h₁₅ : label ∈ l → label ∈ (node v l r : LabelledTree α) := by
                intro h₁₅
                simp [Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem] at h₁₅ ⊢
                <;> aesop
              have h₁₆ : label ∈ (node v l r : LabelledTree α) → label ∈ l ∨ label ∈ r := by
                intro h₁₆
                simp [Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem] at h₁₆ ⊢
                <;> aesop
              -- Combine the results to get the final equivalence
              have h₁₇ : fastCheckMem label (node v l r) = true ↔ label ∈ (node v l r : LabelledTree α) := by
                constructor
                · intro h₁₇
                  have h₁₈ : fastCheckMem label l = true := by
                    rw [h₇] at h₁₇
                    exact h₁₇
                  have h₁₉ : label ∈ l := by
                    have h₂₀ : fastCheckMem label l = true ↔ label ∈ l := by
                      apply (h₂ l h₃.2.2.1)
                    have h₂₁ : fastCheckMem label l = true := h₁₈
                    have h₂₂ : label ∈ l := by
                      rw [h₂₀] at h₂₁
                      exact h₂₁
                    exact h₂₂
                  have h₂₀ : label ∈ (node v l r : LabelledTree α) := by
                    simp [Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem] at h₁₉ ⊢
                    <;> aesop
                  exact h₂₀
                · intro h₁₇
                  have h₁₈ : label ∈ l ∨ label ∈ r := by
                    simp [Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem] at h₁₇ ⊢
                    <;> aesop
                  cases h₁₈ with
                  | inl h₁₈ =>
                    have h₁₉ : fastCheckMem label l = true := by
                      have h₂₀ : fastCheckMem label l = true ↔ label ∈ l := by
                        apply (h₂ l h₃.2.2.1)
                      have h₂₁ : label ∈ l := h₁₈
                      have h₂₂ : fastCheckMem label l = true := by
                        rw [h₂₀]
                        exact h₂₁
                      exact h₂₂
                    have h₂₀ : fastCheckMem label (node v l r) = true := by
                      rw [h₇]
                      exact h₁₉
                    exact h₂₀
                  | inr h₁₈ =>
                    have h₁₉ : label ∈ r := h₁₈
                    have h₂₀ : label < v := h₆
                    have h₂₁ : ∀ x ∈ r, v ≤ x := h₃.1.2
                    have h₂₂ : v ≤ label := by
                      have h₂₃ : label ∈ r := h₁₉
                      have h₂₄ : v ≤ label := h₂₁ label h₂₃
                      exact h₂₄
                    have h₂₃ : label < v := h₆
                    have h₂₄ : ¬(label < v) := by
                      linarith
                    exact absurd h₂₃ h₂₄
              exact h₁₇
            | inr h₆ =>
              -- Subcase: label ≥ v
              have h₇ : ¬(label < v) := h₆
              have h₈ : fastCheckMem label (node v l r) = fastCheckMem label r := by
                simp [h₅, h₇, fastCheckMem]
                <;>
                (try decide) <;>
                (try
                  {
                    by_cases h₉ : label = v
                    <;> simp_all [h₉]
                    <;>
                    (try omega)
                  })
              have h₉ : (fastCheckMem label (node v l r) = true ↔ fastCheckMem label r = true) := by
                rw [h₈]
              have h₁₀ : (label ∈ (node v l r : LabelledTree α) ↔ label ∈ l ∨ label ∈ r) := by
                simp [Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem]
                <;>
                (try decide)
              have h₁₁ : (fastCheckMem label r = true ↔ label ∈ r) := by
                have h₁₂ : IsOrdered r := h₃.2.2.2.1
                have h₁₃ : fastCheckMem label r = true ↔ label ∈ r := by
                  apply (h₂ r h₁₂)
                exact h₁₃
              have h₁₂ : label ∈ r → label ∈ (node v l r : LabelledTree α) := by
                intro h₁₂
                simp [Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem] at h₁₂ ⊢
                <;> aesop
              have h₁₃ : label ∈ (node v l r : LabelledTree α) → label ∈ l ∨ label ∈ r := by
                intro h₁₃
                simp [Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem] at h₁₃ ⊢
                <;> aesop
              have h₁₄ : fastCheckMem label r = true → fastCheckMem label (node v l r) = true := by
                intro h₁₄
                rw [h₈]
                <;> simp_all
              have h₁₅ : fastCheckMem label (node v l r) = true → fastCheckMem label r = true := by
                intro h₁₅
                rw [h₈] at h₁₅
                <;> simp_all
              have h₁₆ : label ∈ r → label ∈ (node v l r : LabelledTree α) := by
                intro h₁₆
                simp [Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem] at h₁₆ ⊢
                <;> aesop
              have h₁₇ : label ∈ (node v l r : LabelledTree α) → label ∈ l ∨ label ∈ r := by
                intro h₁₇
                simp [Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem] at h₁₇ ⊢
                <;> aesop
              -- Combine the results to get the final equivalence
              have h₁₈ : fastCheckMem label (node v l r) = true ↔ label ∈ (node v l r : LabelledTree α) := by
                constructor
                · intro h₁₈
                  have h₁₉ : fastCheckMem label r = true := by
                    rw [h₈] at h₁₈
                    exact h₁₈
                  have h₂₀ : label ∈ r := by
                    have h₂₁ : fastCheckMem label r = true ↔ label ∈ r := by
                      apply (h₂ r h₃.2.2.2.1)
                    have h₂₂ : fastCheckMem label r = true := h₁₉
                    have h₂₃ : label ∈ r := by
                      rw [h₂₁] at h₂₂
                      exact h₂₂
                    exact h₂₃
                  have h₂₁ : label ∈ (node v l r : LabelledTree α) := by
                    simp [Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem] at h₂₀ ⊢
                    <;> aesop
                  exact h₂₁
                · intro h₁₈
                  have h₁₉ : label ∈ l ∨ label ∈ r := by
                    simp [Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem] at h₁₈ ⊢
                    <;> aesop
                  cases h₁₉ with
                  | inl h₁₉ =>
                    have h₂₀ : label ∈ l := h₁₉
                    have h₂₁ : ¬(label < v) := h₆
                    have h₂₂ : ∀ x ∈ l, x ≤ v := h₃.1.1
                    have h₂₃ : label ≤ v := h₂₂ label h₂₀
                    have h₂₄ : label < v ∨ label = v := by
                      cases' lt_or_eq_of_le h₂₃ with h₂₄ h₂₄
                      · exact Or.inl h₂₄
                      · exact Or.inr h₂₄
                    cases h₂₄ with
                    | inl h₂₄ =>
                      have h₂₅ : label < v := h₂₄
                      have h₂

have h₁ : ∀ (t : LabelledTree α) (h : IsOrdered t) (y : α), fastCheckMem y t = true ↔ y ∈ t := by
    intro t h y
    induction t with
    | leaf x =>
      simp [fastCheckMem, mem]
      <;>
      aesop
    | node v l r =>
      simp_all [fastCheckMem, mem, IsOrdered]
      <;>
      (try
        {
          split_ifs at * <;>
          simp_all [IsOrdered]
          <;>
          (try
            {
              (try omega)
              <;>
              (try aesop)
              <;>
              (try
                {
                  (try {
                    cases' le_total y v with hv hv <;>
                    cases' le_total y v with hv' hv' <;>
                    simp_all [IsOrdered] <;>
                    (try omega) <;>
                    (try aesop)
                  })
                  <;>
                  (try {
                    cases' le_total v y with hy hy <;>
                    simp_all [IsOrdered] <;>
                    (try omega) <;>
                    (try aesop)
                  })
                })
            })
          <;>
          (try
            {
              (try {
                by_cases h₂ : y < v <;>
                by_cases h₃ : y = v <;>
                simp_all [h₂, h₃, mem] <;>
                (try omega) <;>
                (try aesop)
              })
              <;>
              (try {
                by_cases h₂ : v < y <;>
                by_cases h₃ : y = v <;>
                simp_all [h₂, h₃, mem] <;>
                (try omega) <;>
                (try aesop)
              })
            })
          <;>
          (try
            {
              (try {
                by_cases h₂ : y < v <;>
                by_cases h₃ : y = v <;>
                simp_all [h₂, h₃, mem] <;>
                (try omega) <;>
                (try aesop)
              })
              <;>
              (try {
                by_cases h₂ : v < y <;>
                by_cases h₃ : y = v <;>
                simp_all [h₂, h₃, mem] <;>
                (try omega) <;>
                (try aesop)
              })
            })
          <;>
          (try omega)
          <;>
          (try aesop)
        })
      <;>
      (try
        {
          (try {
            by_cases h₂ : y < v <;>
            by_cases h₃ : y = v <;>
            simp_all [h₂, h₃, mem] <;>
            (try omega) <;>
            (try aesop)
          })
          <;>
          (try {
            by_cases h₂ : v < y <;>
            by_cases h₃ : y = v <;>
            simp_all [h₂, h₃, mem] <;>
            (try omega) <;>
            (try aesop)
          })
        })
      <;>
      (try omega)
      <;>
      (try aesop)
  have h₂ := h₁ l h label
  exact h₂

have h₁ : ∀ (l : LabelledTree α) (h : IsOrdered l) (x : α), fastCheckMem x l = true ↔ x ∈ l := by
    intro l h x
    have h₂ : ∀ (l : LabelledTree α) (h : IsOrdered l) (x : α), fastCheckMem x l = true ↔ x ∈ l := by
      intro l h x
      induction l using LabelledTree.recOn with
      | leaf a =>
        simp [IsOrdered, fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
        <;>
        aesop
      | node a l r ih =>
        simp [IsOrdered, fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem] at *
        split_ifs at * <;> (try ) <;> (try simp_all [IsOrdered, fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]) <;>
          (try {
            aesop
          }) <;>
          (try {
            have h₃ := ih.1 h.2.2.1
            have h₄ := ih.2.2.1 h.2.2.2.2
            simp_all [IsOrdered, fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
            <;>
            aesop
          }) <;>
          (try {
            have h₃ := ih.1 h.2.2.1
            have h₄ := ih.2.2.1 h.2.2.2.2
            simp_all [IsOrdered, fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
            <;>
            aesop
          }) <;>
          (try {
            have h₃ := ih.1 h.2.2.1
            have h₄ := ih.2.2.1 h.2.2.2.2
            simp_all [IsOrdered, fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
            <;>
            aesop
          })
    exact h₂ l h x
  have h₂ := h₁ l h label
  exact h₂

have h_main : ∀ (t : LabelledTree α), IsOrdered t → (fastCheckMem label t = true ↔ label ∈ t) := by
    intro t ht
    have h₁ : fastCheckMem label t = true ↔ label ∈ t := by
      -- Use induction on the structure of t to prove the equivalence
      induction t using LabelledTree.induction with
      | leaf x =>
        -- Base case: t is a leaf with label x
        simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
        <;>
        (try cases (x = label) <;> simp_all) <;>
        (try cases (x < label) <;> simp_all) <;>
        (try cases (x > label) <;> simp_all) <;>
        (try contradiction) <;>
        (try linarith)
        <;>
        (try {
          have h₂ := ht
          simp [IsOrdered] at h₂
          <;>
          simp_all
          <;>
          linarith
        })
      | node v l r ihl ihr =>
        -- Inductive step: t is a node with value v, left subtree l, and right subtree r
        simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem] at *
        <;>
        (try {
          -- Case: v = label
          by_cases h₂ : v = label
          <;> simp_all [h₂]
          <;>
          (try {
            have h₃ := ht
            simp [IsOrdered] at h₃
            <;>
            (try {
              have h₄ := h₃.1
              have h₅ := h₃.2.1
              have h₆ := h₃.2.2.1
              have h₇ := h₃.2.2.2.1
              have h₈ := h₃.2.2.2.2
              simp_all [h₂]
              <;>
              (try {
                tauto
              })
            })
          })
          <;>
          (try {
            tauto
          })
        })
        <;>
        (try {
          -- Case: label < v
          by_cases h₂ : label < v
          <;> simp_all [h₂]
          <;>
          (try {
            have h₃ := ht
            simp [IsOrdered] at h₃
            <;>
            (try {
              have h₄ := h₃.1
              have h₅ := h₃.2.1
              have h₆ := h₃.2.2.1
              have h₇ := h₃.2.2.2.1
              have h₈ := h₃.2.2.2.2
              have h₉ : IsOrdered l := by tauto
              have h₁₀ : IsOrdered r := by tauto
              have h₁₁ : ∀ x ∈ l, x ≤ v := by tauto
              have h₁₂ : ∀ x ∈ r, v ≤ x := by tauto
              simp_all [h₂]
              <;>
              (try {
                tauto
              })
              <;>
              (try {
                have h₁₃ := ihl h₉
                simp_all [h₂]
                <;>
                (try {
                  tauto
                })
              })
              <;>
              (try {
                have h₁₃ := ihr h₁₀
                simp_all [h₂]
                <;>
                (try {
                  tauto
                })
              })
            })
          })
          <;>
          (try {
            tauto
          })
        })
        <;>
        (try {
          -- Case: label ≥ v
          have h₂ : ¬label < v := by tauto
          have h₃ : label ≥ v := by
            by_contra h₄
            have h₅ : label < v := by
              exact lt_of_not_ge h₄
            contradiction
          simp_all [h₃]
          <;>
          (try {
            have h₄ := ht
            simp [IsOrdered] at h₄
            <;>
            (try {
              have h₅ := h₄.1
              have h₆ := h₄.2.1
              have h₇ := h₄.2.2.1
              have h₈ := h₄.2.2.2.1
              have h₉ := h₄.2.2.2.2
              have h₁₀ : IsOrdered l := by tauto
              have h₁₁ : IsOrdered r := by tauto
              have h₁₂ : ∀ x ∈ l, x ≤ v := by tauto
              have h₁₃ : ∀ x ∈ r, v ≤ x := by tauto
              simp_all [h₃]
              <;>
              (try {
                tauto
              })
              <;>
              (try {
                have h₁₄ := ihl h₁₀
                simp_all [h₃]
                <;>
                (try {
                  tauto
                })
              })
              <;>
              (try {
                have h₁₄ := ihr h₁₁
                simp_all [h₃]
                <;>
                (try {
                  tauto
                })
              })
            })
          })
          <;>
          (try {
            tauto
          })
        })
        <;>
        (try {
          tauto
        })
    exact h₁
  have h_final : fastCheckMem label l = true ↔ label ∈ l := by
    have h₂ : fastCheckMem label l = true ↔ label ∈ l := by
      apply h_main l h
    exact h₂
  exact h_final

have h₁ : fastCheckMem label l = true ↔ label ∈ l := by
    induction l with
    | leaf x =>
      simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
      <;>
      simp_all [BEq, DecidableEq]
      <;>
      aesop
    | node v l r =>
      by_cases h₂ : v = label
      · simp_all [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
      · by_cases h₃ : label < v
        · have h₄ : fastCheckMem label l = true ↔ label ∈ l := by
            apply IH₁
          simp_all [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
          <;>
          aesop
        · have h₄ : ¬(label < v) := h₃
          have h₅ : v ≤ label := by
            cases' lt_or_eq_of_le (le_of_not_lt h₄) with h₅ h₅
            · exfalso
              simp_all
            · simp_all
          have h₆ : fastCheckMem label r = true ↔ label ∈ r := by
            apply IH₂
          simp_all [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
          <;>
          aesop
  exact h₁
